aston_all_addhact01.name: Heat Action: Essence of Face Stomp
aston_all_addhact01.explanation:
"The Racing Street King" is a collection of reports about a street fighter who never stopped running.

I could learn a great technique from this.

aston_skl_dygmr.name: Ultimate Counter (Damage Up)
aston_skl_dygmr.explanation:
"All About the Turnabout" details the secrets of taking down enemies and gaining ultimate fame.

This could help me out of a tough spot.
aston_skl_dygmr.unlocked_message: Perform Ultimate Counter at low health.

aston_skl_dyguhdmgup.name: Extreme Heat Mode (Damage Up)
aston_skl_dyguhdmgup.explanation:
"Raging Dragon, Overkill" is a story of a dark hero with lots of rage.

This will tell me how to draw upon my strength when the odds are against me.

aston_skl_dyguhunstp.name: Extreme Heat Mode (Unflinching)
aston_skl_dyguhunstp.explanation:
"Raging Dragon Never Falls" is the second volume in the Raging Dragon series.

My rage could prevent me from being knocked over.

aston_skl_uhimm.name: Extreme Heat Mode (Undying)
aston_skl_uhimm.explanation:
"Raging Dragon Never Dies" is the final volume in the Raging Dragon series.

My rage could withstand death itself!

aston_skl_dwnprv.name: Insulting Taunt (Downed Enemies)
aston_skl_dwnprv.explanation:
"History of Provoking in Japan" chronicles taunting methods used throughout Japan.

Reading this would remind me what it's like to be a spirited youth.

aston_skl_allprv.name: Devastating Taunt (All Enemies)
aston_skl_allprv.explanation:
"The World History of Provoking" chronicles taunting methods used across the globe.

Reading this would remind me what it's like to be a spirited youth.
aston_skl_allprv.unlocked_message: Press <symbol=button_l3> when there are knocked down enemies.

aston_skl_dyghgup.name: Heat Gauge Auto Charge
aston_skl_dyghgup.explanation:
"Undying and Crazy" is a popular manga about those that surprise everyone by increasing their fighting spirit.

I feel like I've been in similar situations...

aston_skl_smoke.name: Smoky Heat Gauge
aston_skl_smoke.explanation:
"The Art of Smoking" is an old novel that reads like a police file, describing how smoking is essential for the spirit.

Might find a new reason to smoke in here.
aston_skl_smoke.unlocked_message: Activates when smoking in smoking areas.

aston_ory_fnsb01.name: Triple Finisher
aston_ory_fnsb01.explanation:
"Street Fights in Kamurocho" are firsthand accounts of legendary street fights.

It might be fun to try out some of these over-the-top moves they claim I've done.
aston_ory_fnsb01.unlocked_message: Press <symbol=button_sankaku> after landing a Double Finisher.

aston_ory_fnsh01.name: Finishing Hold
aston_ory_fnsh01.explanation:
"Words of Cyclops Oba" is a collection of teachings learned by a pro wrestler.

I haven't used these kinds of moves recently, maybe I should read up.
aston_ory_fnsh01.unlocked_message: While in Extreme Heat Mode with <symbol=button_r2>, press <symbol=button_maru> after the first hit from the Finishing Blow.

aston_ory_dblswy.name: Rolling Escape
aston_ory_dblswy.explanation: "Dodge Those Balls!" details the Daidoji teaching of avoiding large movements when dodging, and what to do when you have no other choice.

aston_ory_dwnatk.name: The Countdown
aston_ory_dwnatk.explanation:
"Breakin' Ain't Dancin'" is an autobiography of a man who danced and fought in the 1980s.

This could be useful to add into a counterattack.

aston_ory_swayat.name: Quickstep Strike
aston_ory_swayat.explanation:
"How to Hit Mr. Try and Hit Me" is an elderly man's advice on how to attack while dodging.

I've learned something like this before...
aston_ory_swayat.unlocked_message: Dodge with <symbol=button_batsu> while pressing <symbol=button_r1>, then press <symbol=button_sankaku>.

aston_ory_rev02.name: Flexing Resolute Counter
aston_ory_rev02.explanation:
"Backed Into a Corner" asserts that training one's back muscles are the key to counterattacking.

I can feel my back getting stronger already!
aston_ory_rev02.unlocked_message: Press and hold <symbol=button_sankaku> while being hit.

aston_ory_cntr.name: Tiger Drop
aston_ory_cntr.explanation:
"To Kill a Tiger" is by a man who was inspired by an anonymous martial artist.

I do tend to forget this if I don't use it. Couldn't hurt to revisit the basics.
aston_ory_cntr.unlocked_message: Enter stance with <symbol=button_r1>. Press <symbol=button_sankaku> right before the attack lands.

aston_ory_addhact01.name: Heat Action: Essence of Raging Dragon
aston_ory_addhact01.explanation:
"Raging Memories" is written by a former yakuza, detailing the memories of his raids.

I might be able to recall something from this.

aston_ory_addhact02.name: Heat Action: Essence of the Dragon God
aston_ory_addhact02.explanation:
"Unleash Your Inner Beast" writes about the mental part of fighting.

I'm not sure if I've got an inner beast, but I am sure I'll learn a special move.
aston_ory_addhact02.unlocked_message: While in Extreme Heat Mode with <symbol=button_r2>, press <symbol=button_sankaku> while near an enemy and at low health.

aston_ory_addhact03.name: Heat Action: Essence of Double Crush
aston_ory_addhact03.explanation:
"The Theory of Crushing Your Foes" has tips for taking on multiple enemies.

I think I could learn a special move from this manual.
aston_ory_addhact03.unlocked_message: Grab an enemy and press <symbol=button_sankaku> near another enemy. Your health must be full.

aston_ory_addhact04.name: Heat Action: Ultimate Essence
aston_ory_addhact04.explanation:
"Glorious Meditation" writes about methods used to return to your former self.

Looks like I can learn a special move from this.
aston_ory_addhact04.unlocked_message: In Extreme Heat Mode with <symbol=button_r2>, press <symbol=button_sankaku> near an enemy while in a fighting stance.

aston_agt_grd01.name: Daidoji Double Guard
aston_agt_grd01.explanation:
"Physical Arts: Hidden Shield" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

Looks like it'll teach me how to hold my ground after my guard's been broken.
aston_agt_grd01.unlocked_message: Hold <symbol=button_l1> immediately after guard is broken.

aston_agt_jstswyatk01.name: Extreme Heat: Rakushasa Strikes
aston_agt_jstswyatk01.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Rapid Rebuttal" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me how to quickly strike an enemy by parrying an attack.
aston_agt_jstswyatk01.unlocked_message: When an enemy melee attacks while you hold <symbol=button_r1>, press <symbol=button_batsu> to dodge, then press <symbol=button_shikaku>.

aston_agt_dwnccl.name: Daidoji Knockdown Recovery
aston_agt_dwnccl.explanation:
"Physical Arts: Breaking Your Fall" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me how to counter being knocked down.

aston_agt_swayat.name: Daidoji Evasive Strike
aston_agt_swayat.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Veiled Response" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me how to strike after dodging.
aston_agt_swayat.unlocked_message: Dodge with <symbol=button_batsu> while pressing <symbol=button_r1>, then press <symbol=button_sankaku> or <symbol=button_shikaku>.

aston_agt_addhact01.name: Heat Action: Daidoji Arm Theft
aston_agt_addhact01.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Firearm Flip" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

I can learn how to deal with pistols from this.
aston_agt_addhact01.unlocked_message: Press <symbol=button_sankaku> near an enemy with a gun.

aston_agt_addhact02.name: Heat Action: Daidoji Defense Break
aston_agt_addhact02.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Cracking the Wall" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique. 

This will teach me how to deal with defensive enemies.

aston_agt_addhact03.name: Heat Action: Daidoji Bear Trap
aston_agt_addhact03.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Sleeping Snare" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me how to recover from being knocked down.

aston_agt_addhact04.name: Heat Action: Daidoji Martial Mastery
aston_agt_addhact04.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Agent Tool Compendium" is a guide on Daidoji gadgets.

Might be nice to come up with a move that uses them all.
aston_agt_addhact04.unlocked_message: While in Extreme Heat Mode with <symbol=button_r2>, press <symbol=button_r1> to take a stance, then <symbol=button_sankaku> near multiple enemies.

aston_ory_grpdrev.name: Grip Breaker
aston_ory_grpdrev.explanation:
"The Grapple Killer" is by a retired MMA fighter that used only standing techniques.

I'll definitely learn how to handle being grabbed in this.

aston_ory_grdrev.name: Knock Back
aston_ory_grdrev.explanation:
"Field Training" is a street fighting guide penned by an anonymous martial artist.

I think I know who this is. Might be good to think on the old man's words.
aston_ory_grdrev.unlocked_message: Press <symbol=button_sankaku> after getting hit while guarding with <symbol=button_l1>.

aston_ory_mr2.name: Twisting Ultimate Counter
aston_ory_mr2.explanation:
"End on a High Note" describes the aesthetics of throwing techniques.

I could use this to give myself an extra push when taking out stronger foes.

aston_agt_trpswy.name: Daidoji Knockdown Avoidance
aston_agt_trpswy.explanation:
"Physical Arts: Escaping Defeat" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

I'll be able to do this maneuver three times in a row after reading this.

aston_agt_jstswyatk02.name: Extreme Heat: Wrathful Kick
aston_agt_jstswyatk02.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Forceful Intercept" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me how to land a strong hit by parrying an enemy's attack.
aston_agt_jstswyatk02.unlocked_message: When an enemy melee attacks while you hold <symbol=button_r1>, press <symbol=button_batsu> to dodge, then press <symbol=button_sankaku>.

aston_agt_grpdrev.name: Daidoji Grapple Strike
aston_agt_grpdrev.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Seize & Struggle" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

I can learn how to attack while grappling if I read this.

aston_agt_mr2.name: Tangled Ultimate Counter
aston_agt_mr2.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Caught in a Web" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will add a twist when facing a strong foe.

aston_agt_wiratk1.name: Daidoji Trip Wire
aston_agt_wiratk1.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Entangled Web" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me an attack I can use with the Spider gadget.
aston_agt_wiratk1.unlocked_message: Release <symbol=button_maru> while holding an enemy with the wire to pull them in, then press <symbol=button_sankaku>.

aston_agt_wiratk2.name: Daidoji Wire Spin
aston_agt_wiratk2.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Elastic Thread" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me an attack I can use with the Spider gadget.
aston_agt_wiratk2.unlocked_message: Release <symbol=button_maru> while holding an enemy with the wire to pull them in, then press <symbol=button_maru>.

aston_skl_infeatalc.name: No Reservations
aston_skl_infeatalc.explanation:
"The Theory of Excessive Eating and Drinking" is an odd book written by a legendary competitive eater.

I could keep eating, even on a full stomach!

aston_agt_wiratk0.name: Daidoji High Wire Strike
aston_agt_wiratk0.explanation:
"Defensive Arts: Ensnaring Silk" is a guide on a legendary defensive technique.

This will teach me an attack I can use with the Spider gadget.
aston_agt_wiratk0.unlocked_message: Pull enemy caught in wire with <symbol=button_l_stick> then press <symbol=button_sankaku>.

ggt_wire_plus1.name: Sticky Threads
ggt_wire_plus1.explanation:
"Pilfering with Heavy Hands" writes about stealing enemy weapons with a bundo kusari, a chain with weights at each end.

Looks like I could use this with the Spider gadget.
ggt_wire_plus1.unlocked_message: Effective against 1 enemy with a weapon. While holding <symbol=button_r1>, press and hold <symbol=button_maru>.

ggt_wire_plus2.name: Power Spool
ggt_wire_plus2.explanation: An additional gadget mechanism that can pull in heavy weapons and enemies.
ggt_wire_plus2.unlocked_message: Pull in heavy weapons with <symbol=button_l2>, heavy unarmed enemies by holding <symbol=button_maru>.

ggt_drone_plus1.name: Hornet Durability Boost
ggt_drone_plus1.explanation: A gadget enhancement mechanism that increases the durability of each drone.
